rows.label: qev096801_001
rows.name:
Greetings. You must be the one undergoing
the Doll license examination.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_002
rows.name: I work with the Arms in product testing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_003
rows.name:
I have three weapons for you today—you
will use one of them to hunt indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_004
rows.name:
Remote weapon-usage monitoring
is a crucial source of data
for arms manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_005
rows.name:
Your cooperation in this
process is most appreciated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_006
rows.name:
We're now testing the trial knife,
trial assault rifle, and trial sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_007
rows.name:
Please use whichever of the
three weapons you like to hunt
down three giant lupuses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096801_008
rows.name:
Once you have completed the
tests for each of the eight
Unions, report back to Walter.[ST:wait ]
